roa.docketEntryComment: PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S MOT TO SUPPRESS, FILED

/AJW/CH1:SP 2 Y:L/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 96 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 96 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 192 DAYS,/STATES/DNA/CTORD: DEFENDANT WILL PAYRESTITUTION TO THE VICTIM AS PER CDCR/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL POSSESS NO GUNS OR AMMUNITION/SA1: MAYANK JHERIER, GIAN VILLANUEVA, PABLO GARCIA, CALVIN CHOW/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO STAY OUT OF THE CVS STORES AT ONE JEFFERSON AND265 MASON STREETS, OUT OF THE CLOSET AT 1295 FOLSOM ST, SF/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/
